acceptance_criteria.description: Users must be unable to access any page without first logging in with valid credentials. Attempting to access a protected page without authentication should redirect back to the login page.
kane_steps: Open https://www.saucedemo.com/inventory.html without logging in
Observe that the browser is redirected to the login page
Confirm no inventory content is visible
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Protected pages require valid login first

acceptance_criteria.description: After successfully logging in with valid credentials (standard_user / secret_sauce), the user is redirected to the product inventory page.
kane_steps: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/
Enter username 'standard_user' and password 'secret_sauce'
Click the Login button
Confirm the URL changes to /inventory.html and the product inventory page is displayed
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Successful login redirects to inventory page

acceptance_criteria.description: The inventory page must display product tiles, each showing the product name, image, and price.
kane_steps: Log in with valid credentials and navigate to the inventory page
Inspect each product tile on the page
Confirm every tile displays a product name, an image, and a price
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Inventory tiles show name, image, and price

acceptance_criteria.description: Clicking a product name on the inventory page opens the product detail page for that product.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Click the name of any product
Confirm the product detail page opens and displays information for the selected product
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Clicking product name opens detail page

acceptance_criteria.description: Clicking a product image on the inventory page opens the product detail page for that product.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Click the image of any product
Confirm the product detail page opens and displays information for the selected product
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Clicking product image opens detail page

acceptance_criteria.description: The product detail page must display the product name, description, price, and an Add to cart button.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Click on any product to open its detail page
Confirm the page shows the product name, description, price, and an Add to cart button
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Detail page shows name, description, price, button

acceptance_criteria.description: Users can add a product to the cart from the inventory page by clicking the Add to cart button on a product tile.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Click the Add to cart button on any product tile
Navigate to /cart.html and confirm the product appears in the cart
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Add to cart from inventory page works

acceptance_criteria.description: After clicking Add to cart on the inventory page, the button label for that product changes to Remove.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Note a product tile showing an Add to cart button
Click the Add to cart button
Confirm the button label on that tile changes to Remove
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Button changes to Remove after adding

acceptance_criteria.description: After adding a product to the cart, the cart badge in the top navigation updates to reflect the current number of items in the cart.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Observe the cart badge (should show no number or zero)
Click Add to cart on one product
Confirm the cart badge now displays '1'
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Cart badge updates with item count

acceptance_criteria.description: Users can remove a product from the cart directly from the inventory page by clicking the Remove button on the product tile.
kane_steps: Log in, navigate to the inventory page, and add a product to the cart
Click the Remove button on that product tile
Navigate to /cart.html and confirm the product is no longer listed
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Remove button removes item from cart

acceptance_criteria.description: After clicking the Remove button on the inventory page, the button label changes back to Add to cart.
kane_steps: Log in and add a product to the cart from the inventory page
Observe the product tile button shows Remove
Click the Remove button
Confirm the button label reverts to Add to cart
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Button reverts to Add to Cart after removal

acceptance_criteria.description: Users can navigate to the cart page at /cart.html and view it successfully.
kane_steps: Log in with valid credentials
Click the cart icon in the top navigation or navigate directly to /cart.html
Confirm the cart page loads without error

acceptance_criteria.description: The cart page lists all items that have been added, showing each item's name, quantity, and price.
kane_steps: Log in and add two or more products to the cart from the inventory page
Navigate to /cart.html
Confirm each added item is listed with its name, quantity, and price
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Cart page lists items with name, quantity, price

acceptance_criteria.description: Users can sort products on the inventory page using the sort dropdown located in the top right of the page.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Locate the sort dropdown in the top right
Click the dropdown and confirm sort options are available
Select any option and confirm the product list reorders accordingly
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Sort dropdown is present and functional

acceptance_criteria.description: The sort dropdown must offer exactly four options: Name (A to Z), Name (Z to A), Price (low to high), and Price (high to low).
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Click the sort dropdown
Confirm the four options Name (A to Z), Name (Z to A), Price (low to high), Price (high to low) are all present
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Sort dropdown contains all four options

acceptance_criteria.description: Selecting Price (low to high) from the sort dropdown displays the cheapest product (Sauce Labs Onesie at $7.99) as the first item in the list.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Select Price (low to high) from the sort dropdown
Confirm the first product tile displayed is Sauce Labs Onesie
Confirm its price is $7.99
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Price low-to-high shows cheapest product first

acceptance_criteria.description: Selecting Name (A to Z) from the sort dropdown displays Sauce Labs Backpack as the first product in the list.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Select Name (A to Z) from the sort dropdown
Confirm the first product tile displayed is Sauce Labs Backpack
